title.en: The Wi-Fi 7 Vocabulary: New Definitions, Architecture and Services
title.zh: Wi-Fi 7 的词汇表：新定义、体系结构与服务

blocks.en: Every amendment to IEEE 802.11 begins not with new radios but with new words. Before 802.11be can define 320 MHz channels, 4096-QAM, or multi-link operation, it must first rewrite the front matter of the standard — the definitions, abbreviations, architecture, and service descriptions in Clauses 1 through 8 — so that the rest of the document has a precise vocabulary to lean on. This lesson is a guided tour of those foundational edits. The single biggest idea threaded through all of them is the multi-link device, or MLD: a logical device that owns several affiliated stations (STAs) operating on different links at the same time. Almost every classic 802.11 concept — association, security, the distribution system, the data path — gets a second, MLD-aware reading added next to its original one.
blocks.zh: IEEE 802.11 的每一次修订都不是从新的射频开始，而是从新的词汇开始。在 802.11be 能够定义 320 MHz 信道、4096-QAM 或多链路操作之前，它必须先改写标准的前置部分——即第 1 到第 8 章中的定义、缩略语、体系结构与服务描述——这样文档的其余部分才有精确的术语可以依托。本课就是对这些基础性修订的导览。贯穿所有修订的最核心概念是多链路设备（MLD）：一个逻辑设备，它拥有若干个隶属站点（STA），这些站点可同时在不同链路上工作。几乎每一个经典的 802.11 概念——关联、安全、分布式系统、数据通路——都在其原有含义旁边新增了一层“面向 MLD”的解读。

blocks.en: The amendment opens by tightening the language itself. Clause 1.4 (Word Usage) adds a crucial convention: from now on, an unqualified "STA" means a STA that is NOT affiliated with an MLD, and an unqualified "AP" likewise means a non-MLD AP — so whenever multi-link is meant, the text says so explicitly. It also clarifies that in MLD management (authentication, (re)association, the 4-way handshake), the SME is the entity that manages the MLD, and that a PeerSTAAddress may carry either a plain STA address or an MLD MAC address depending on context. Clause 1.5 (mathematical, logical, and bit operations) adds the small but pervasive helpers min(x, y) and max(x, y), used throughout the new EHT numerology.
blocks.zh: 本修订首先收紧了语言本身。第 1.4 节（用词约定）新增了一条关键约定：从此以后，未加限定的“STA”指的是“不”隶属于任何 MLD 的 STA，未加限定的“AP”同样指非 MLD 的 AP——因此凡是涉及多链路之处，文本都会明确说明。它还澄清：在 MLD 管理（认证、（重）关联、四次握手）的语境中，SME 是管理该 MLD 的实体；而 PeerSTAAddress 视上下文既可能携带普通 STA 地址，也可能携带 MLD 的 MAC 地址。第 1.5 节（数学、逻辑与比特运算术语）新增了简短却处处用到的辅助函数 min(x, y) 与 max(x, y)，它们贯穿于新的 EHT 数值体系中。

blocks.en: Reading tip for the whole standard: if you see "STA" alone, think single-link, non-MLD device. If you see "non-AP MLD" or "AP MLD", you are in multi-link territory and the rules about shared keys, shared sequence numbers, and per-link delivery come into play. This one convention from Clause 1.4 unlocks the rest of the document.
blocks.zh: 阅读整部标准的小贴士：若只看到单独的“STA”，就把它理解为单链路、非 MLD 的设备；若看到“non-AP MLD”或“AP MLD”，则进入了多链路语境，关于共享密钥、共享序列号与按链路投递的规则随之生效。仅第 1.4 节的这一条约定，就能解锁文档的其余部分。

blocks.en: Clause 3 then rewrites the dictionary. Clause 3.1 (Definitions) re-words the classic service definitions so they apply to MLDs too: association now establishes a mapping not only between an AP/PCP and a STA but also between an AP MLD and a non-AP MLD; authentication establishes the identity of one MLD to another; and the transition definitions (BSS transition, ESS transition, fast BSS transition) all gain non-AP MLD wording — a BSS transition may even switch a device between non-MLO and MLO operation. Clause 3.2 (Definitions specific to IEEE 802.11) extends the PPDU vocabulary, adding the EHT PPDU variants (for example a 20 MHz EHT PPDU with CH_BANDWIDTH equal to CBW20, transmitted with the Clause 36 spectral mask) alongside the existing HT/VHT/HE forms.
blocks.zh: 第 3 章随后改写了“词典”。第 3.1 节（定义）重新表述了经典服务定义，使其同样适用于 MLD：关联现在不仅在 AP/PCP 与 STA 之间建立映射，也在 AP MLD 与 non-AP MLD 之间建立映射；认证用于确立一个 MLD 对另一个 MLD 的身份；而各种切换定义（BSS 切换、ESS 切换、快速 BSS 切换）都新增了 non-AP MLD 的措辞——一次 BSS 切换甚至可能让设备在非 MLO 与 MLO 操作之间切换。第 3.2 节（IEEE 802.11 专用定义）扩展了 PPDU 词汇，在既有的 HT/VHT/HE 形式之外，新增了 EHT PPDU 的各种变体（例如 CH_BANDWIDTH 等于 CBW20、按第 36 章频谱模板发送的 20 MHz EHT PPDU）。

blocks.en: Clause 3.4 (Abbreviations and acronyms) is where the Wi-Fi 7 alphabet soup is officially defined. The headline acronyms — EHT (extremely high throughput), MLD (multi-link device), MLO (multi-link operation), MRU (multiple resource unit) — sit alongside the multi-link mode acronyms EMLSR, EMLMR, NSTR, STR, the new TID-to-link-mapping term TTLM, the latency feature R-TWT, EPCS (emergency preparedness communications service), and TXS (triggered TXOP sharing). Memorising this short list makes the entire amendment readable.
blocks.zh: 第 3.4 节（缩略语与首字母缩写）正式定义了 Wi-Fi 7 的“字母汤”。核心缩略语——EHT（极高吞吐量）、MLD（多链路设备）、MLO（多链路操作）、MRU（多资源单元）——与多链路模式缩略语 EMLSR、EMLMR、NSTR、STR，以及新的 TID-到-链路映射术语 TTLM、时延特性 R-TWT、EPCS（应急准备通信服务）、TXS（触发式 TXOP 共享）并列出现。记住这份简短的清单，就能读懂整部修订。

blocks.en:
graph TD
  MLD["non-AP MLD (one logical device)"] --> S1["STA 1 — Link 1 (2.4 GHz)"]
  MLD --> S2["STA 2 — Link 2 (5 GHz)"]
  MLD --> S3["STA 3 — Link 3 (6 GHz)"]
  S1 --> AP["AP MLD"]
  S2 --> AP
  S3 --> AP
  AP --> DS["Distribution System (knows the MLD MAC address)"]
blocks.zh:
graph TD
  MLD["non-AP MLD（一个逻辑设备）"] --> S1["STA 1 — 链路 1 (2.4 GHz)"]
  MLD --> S2["STA 2 — 链路 2 (5 GHz)"]
  MLD --> S3["STA 3 — 链路 3 (6 GHz)"]
  S1 --> AP["AP MLD"]
  S2 --> AP
  S3 --> AP
  AP --> DS["分布式系统（知道 MLD 的 MAC 地址）"]

blocks.en: Clause 4 carries the MLD idea into the architecture. Clause 4.3.5 (Distribution system concepts) clarifies that all BSSs created by APs affiliated with one AP MLD share the same SSID and belong to the same ESS, and that the AP MLD is part of that same ESS. Clause 4.3.8 (RSNA) is rewritten so that authentication, key management, and the IEEE 802.1X port access entity all operate at the level of an MLD as well as a STA: a single Authenticator/Supplicant pair and one RSNA key hierarchy serve the whole MLD. Clause 4.3.22 (Wireless network management) adds MLD max idle period management (4.3.22.2a) — the AP MLD will not disassociate a non-AP MLD as long as it hears frames on at least one setup link — and updates WNM sleep mode so a single signalling STA can put all of the MLD's affiliated STAs into doze.
blocks.zh: 第 4 章把 MLD 的理念带入体系结构。第 4.3.5 节（分布式系统概念）澄清：隶属于同一个 AP MLD 的各 AP 所创建的所有 BSS 共享同一 SSID 并属于同一 ESS，且该 AP MLD 也属于这同一个 ESS。第 4.3.8 节（RSNA）被改写，使认证、密钥管理与 IEEE 802.1X 端口访问实体既在 STA 层面、也在 MLD 层面运作：单一的 Authenticator/Supplicant 配对与一套 RSNA 密钥层级服务于整个 MLD。第 4.3.22 节（无线网络管理）新增了 MLD 最大空闲周期管理（4.3.22.2a）——只要 AP MLD 在至少一条建立链路上听到帧，就不会解除对该 non-AP MLD 的关联——并更新了 WNM 睡眠模式，使单个发信令的 STA 即可让该 MLD 的所有隶属 STA 进入打盹状态。

blocks.en: Clause 4.5 surveys the services, and 802.11be touches several. Clause 4.5.3 (Connectivity-related services) extends association, reassociation, and disassociation to non-AP MLDs, voiding or updating the DS's non-AP-MLD-to-AP-MLD mapping. Clause 4.5.4 (Access control and data confidentiality services) updates the MAC privacy enhancements (4.5.4.10) so a non-AP MLD can randomise the MAC addresses of its affiliated STAs and use device-ID / IRM / measurement-ID mechanisms to be re-recognised without enabling third-party tracking. Clause 4.5.6 (Traffic differentiation and QoS) adds support for predictable latency (4.5.6.3), pointing to R-TWT as the mechanism that gives latency-sensitive, bursty real-time traffic enhanced medium protection and resource reservation. Finally, Clause 4.5.13 introduces the brand-new EPCS priority access service — prioritised channel access and resource allocation for a small set of authorised devices during congestion, enabled per link across an MLD via EPCS Priority Access Enable Request/Response frames.
blocks.zh: 第 4.5 节概览了各项服务，802.11be 对其中数项做了改动。第 4.5.3 节（连接相关服务）将关联、重关联与解关联扩展到 non-AP MLD，相应地作废或更新 DS 中的“non-AP MLD 到 AP MLD”映射。第 4.5.4 节（访问控制与数据保密服务）更新了 MAC 隐私增强（4.5.4.10），使 non-AP MLD 能随机化其隶属 STA 的 MAC 地址，并借助设备 ID / IRM / 测量 ID 机制在不为第三方追踪提供便利的前提下被重新识别。第 4.5.6 节（流量区分与 QoS）新增了对可预测时延的支持（4.5.6.3），并指出 R-TWT 是为时延敏感、突发式的实时流量提供增强介质保护与资源预留的机制。最后，第 4.5.13 节引入了全新的 EPCS 优先接入服务——在网络拥塞期间为一小部分获授权设备提供优先的信道接入与资源分配，并通过 EPCS 优先接入启用请求/响应帧在 MLD 范围内按链路启用。

blocks.en: EPCS (Clause 4.5.13) is genuinely new in 802.11be — it is the Wi-Fi equivalent of the priority-access services that emergency and government communications enjoy on cellular and wireline networks. It is invoked on-demand by a higher layer, only for authorised devices, and once enabled it raises the priority of all traffic to and from that non-AP MLD on every set-up link.
blocks.zh: EPCS（第 4.5.13 节）在 802.11be 中确实是全新的——它相当于应急与政府通信在蜂窝网和有线网上享有的优先接入服务在 Wi-Fi 中的对应物。它由高层按需调用，仅面向获授权设备；一旦启用，便会在每条已建立链路上提高该 non-AP MLD 收发全部流量的优先级。

blocks.en: Clauses 4.9, 5, 7 and 8 finish the picture by updating the reference models and the service-access-point (SAP) plumbing. Clause 4.9.4 (Reference model for multi-band operation) reaffirms that a multi-band device manages several bands/channels via transparent and nontransparent FST, simultaneously or not — and the amendment adds a companion MLO reference model in which each MLD has a single MAC-SAP while each affiliated STA keeps a distinct MAC address. Clause 5.1.5 (MAC data service architecture) defines the MLD data plane: a transmitted MSDU passes through TTLM, which forwards MPDUs by TID down to one or more lower-MAC entities and their PHY SAPs, while reception merges MPDUs arriving from different PHY SAPs — and crucially, the same PTKSA encrypts and decrypts on every link.
blocks.zh: 第 4.9、5、7、8 章通过更新参考模型与服务接入点（SAP）的“管路”来补全这幅图景。第 4.9.4 节（多频段操作参考模型）重申：多频段设备通过透明与非透明 FST 管理多个频段/信道，可同时也可不同时进行——而本修订新增了配套的 MLO 参考模型，其中每个 MLD 拥有单一的 MAC-SAP，而每个隶属 STA 保留各自不同的 MAC 地址。第 5.1.5 节（MAC 数据服务体系结构）定义了 MLD 的数据面：待发送的 MSDU 经过 TTLM，由其按 TID 把 MPDU 向下转发到一个或多个下层 MAC 实体及其 PHY SAP；接收时则把来自不同 PHY SAP 的 MPDU 合并——关键在于，同一个 PTKSA 在每条链路上完成加密与解密。

blocks.en: Clause 5.2.4 (MA-UNITDATA.request) adds new parameters to the primitive that hands an MSDU down to the MAC — including an SCSID that, when SCS is active, identifies the SCS stream the MSDU belongs to (tying the data path to the QoS stream classification). Clause 7.1 / 7.2.3 (the DS SAP) make the distribution system MLD-aware: the AP MLD becomes a DS SAP user, the DS maps non-AP MLDs to AP MLDs by MLD MAC address, and the DS-STA-NOTIFY primitive (7.2.3) gains the ability to ADD/MOVE/DELETE a non-AP-MLD-to-AP-MLD mapping. Clause 8.3.5 (PHY SAP) extends PHY-CCA.indication: an EHT STA wider than 20 MHz reports a per-20-MHz busy/idle bitmap defined in Clause 36, so the MAC can see exactly which 20 MHz subchannels of a 320 MHz channel are clear.
blocks.zh: 第 5.2.4 节（MA-UNITDATA.request）为把 MSDU 下交给 MAC 的原语新增了参数——包括一个 SCSID，当 SCS 处于激活状态时，它标识该 MSDU 所属的 SCS 流（从而把数据通路与 QoS 流分类绑定起来）。第 7.1 / 7.2.3 节（DS SAP）使分布式系统具备 MLD 意识：AP MLD 成为 DS SAP 的用户，DS 按 MLD 的 MAC 地址把 non-AP MLD 映射到 AP MLD，而 DS-STA-NOTIFY 原语（7.2.3）获得了对“non-AP MLD 到 AP MLD”映射执行 ADD/MOVE/DELETE 的能力。第 8.3.5 节（PHY SAP）扩展了 PHY-CCA.indication：宽度大于 20 MHz 的 EHT STA 上报一个按第 36 章定义的每 20 MHz 忙/闲位图，使 MAC 能精确看到 320 MHz 信道中哪些 20 MHz 子信道是空闲的。

summary.en: Coverage map — exactly where each of the 18 clauses lives in 802.11be-2024
summary.zh: 覆盖图——802.11be-2024 中这 18 个条款各自的精确位置

blocks.en: Word usage and math: 1.4 (Word Usage — the unqualified-STA/AP convention and SME-manages-the-MLD rule, p.54), 1.5 (mathematical/logical/bit terminology — min/max, p.54). Definitions and abbreviations: 3.1 (Definitions — association/authentication/transition re-worded for MLDs, p.56), 3.2 (Definitions specific to IEEE 802.11 — EHT PPDU variants, p.57), 3.4 (Abbreviations and acronyms — EHT, MLD, MLO, MRU, EMLSR, EMLMR, NSTR, STR, TTLM, R-TWT, EPCS, TXS, p.65). Architecture: 4.3.5 (Distribution system / ESS — AP MLD shares one SSID/ESS, p.66), 4.3.8 (RSNA — MLD-level authentication and 802.1X PAE, p.66), 4.3.22 (Wireless network management — MLD max idle period 4.3.22.2a and WNM sleep, pp.68-69). Services: 4.5.3 (Connectivity — association/reassociation/disassociation for MLDs, pp.69-72), 4.5.4 (Access control and data confidentiality — MAC privacy enhancements 4.5.4.10, p.72), 4.5.6 (Traffic differentiation and QoS — predictable latency 4.5.6.3 via R-TWT, p.73), 4.5.13 (EPCS priority access — the new emergency-preparedness service, pp.73-74). Reference and data models: 4.9.4 (Reference model for multi-band operation, plus the new MLO reference model 4.9.6, p.74), 5.1.5 (MAC data service architecture — the MLD data plane with TTLM and shared PTKSA, pp.79-81), 5.2.4 (MA-UNITDATA.request — new SCSID parameter, p.84). SAP plumbing: 7.1 (DS SAP introduction — AP MLD as DS SAP user, p.109), 7.2.3 (Mapping updates — DS-STA-NOTIFY for non-AP-MLD-to-AP-MLD maps, pp.110-111), 8.3.5 (PHY SAP detailed service specification — PHY-CCA.indication per-20 bitmap for EHT, p.112).
blocks.zh: 用词与数学：1.4（用词约定——未加限定的 STA/AP 约定与“SME 管理 MLD”规则，第 54 页）、1.5（数学/逻辑/比特术语——min/max，第 54 页）。定义与缩略语：3.1（定义——关联/认证/切换面向 MLD 重新表述，第 56 页）、3.2（IEEE 802.11 专用定义——EHT PPDU 变体，第 57 页）、3.4（缩略语与首字母缩写——EHT、MLD、MLO、MRU、EMLSR、EMLMR、NSTR、STR、TTLM、R-TWT、EPCS、TXS，第 65 页）。体系结构：4.3.5（分布式系统 / ESS——AP MLD 共享同一 SSID/ESS，第 66 页）、4.3.8（RSNA——MLD 层面的认证与 802.1X PAE，第 66 页）、4.3.22（无线网络管理——MLD 最大空闲周期 4.3.22.2a 与 WNM 睡眠，第 68-69 页）。服务：4.5.3（连接服务——面向 MLD 的关联/重关联/解关联，第 69-72 页）、4.5.4（访问控制与数据保密——MAC 隐私增强 4.5.4.10，第 72 页）、4.5.6（流量区分与 QoS——经 R-TWT 实现的可预测时延 4.5.6.3，第 73 页）、4.5.13（EPCS 优先接入——全新的应急准备服务，第 73-74 页）。参考与数据模型：4.9.4（多频段操作参考模型，以及新的 MLO 参考模型 4.9.6，第 74 页）、5.1.5（MAC 数据服务体系结构——含 TTLM 与共享 PTKSA 的 MLD 数据面，第 79-81 页）、5.2.4（MA-UNITDATA.request——新增 SCSID 参数，第 84 页）。SAP 管路：7.1（DS SAP 引言——AP MLD 作为 DS SAP 用户，第 109 页）、7.2.3（映射更新——用于“non-AP MLD 到 AP MLD”映射的 DS-STA-NOTIFY，第 110-111 页）、8.3.5（PHY SAP 详细服务规范——面向 EHT 的 PHY-CCA.indication 每 20 MHz 位图，第 112 页）。

blocks.en: The takeaway: 802.11be's earliest clauses are not throwaway boilerplate — they are where the multi-link world is bootstrapped. A new word-usage convention, a handful of acronyms, an extended set of service definitions, an MLD-aware distribution system and data path, and two genuinely new services (EPCS priority access and predictable-latency support via R-TWT) together give the rest of the amendment — 320 MHz, 4096-QAM, multi-RU, EMLSR/EMLMR — a precise foundation to build on.
blocks.zh: 要点：802.11be 最靠前的几个条款并非可有可无的样板文字——它们正是多链路世界的引导之处。一条新的用词约定、一组缩略语、一套扩展的服务定义、一个具备 MLD 意识的分布式系统与数据通路，以及两项真正全新的服务（EPCS 优先接入与经由 R-TWT 实现的可预测时延支持），共同为本修订的其余部分——320 MHz、4096-QAM、多 RU、EMLSR/EMLMR——奠定了精确的基础。

cites.note: 1.4 Word Usage (unqualified STA/AP convention, SME manages MLD); 1.5 math/logical/bit terminology (min/max)
3.1 Definitions re-worded for MLDs (association, authentication, transitions); 3.2 EHT PPDU variants
3.4 Abbreviations and acronyms — EHT, MLD, MLO, MRU, EMLSR, EMLMR, NSTR, STR, TTLM, R-TWT, EPCS, TXS
4.3.5 DS/ESS for AP MLD; 4.3.8 RSNA at MLD level; 4.3.22 wireless network management incl. MLD max idle period 4.3.22.2a
4.5.3 connectivity services for MLDs; 4.5.4 MAC privacy enhancements; 4.5.6 predictable latency; 4.5.13 EPCS priority access; 4.9.4/4.9.6 reference models
5.1.5 MLD MAC data service architecture (TTLM, shared PTKSA, Figure 5-2a/5-2b); 5.2.4 MA-UNITDATA.request new SCSID parameter
7.1 DS SAP introduction with AP MLD as user; 7.2.3 DS-STA-NOTIFY mapping updates for non-AP MLD to AP MLD
8.3.5 PHY SAP detailed service specification — PHY-CCA.indication per-20 bitmap for EHT STA
